meta.title: Creators — K-LINK
meta.description: Join K-LINK to collaborate with Korean beauty brands on paid campaigns worldwide.

hero.title: Your next campaign starts with Korean beauty brands
hero.subtitle: Browse open briefs, apply in one place, and submit content when you're selected — all on one platform built for trust and clarity.

steps.title: How it works
steps.1d: Share your channels, audience, and the kind of content you love to make.
steps.2d: Explore active K-beauty collaborations that match your style and region.
steps.3d: Brands review applicants; if you're chosen, you'll move forward with clear deliverables.
steps.4d: Post your content and drop your links in K-LINK so brands can review results.

cta.secondary: New to K-LINK? Use a demo account on the login page to explore.

benefits.title: Why creators stay on K-LINK
benefits.1d: Find Korean beauty campaigns that fit your audience and content tone.
benefits.2d: Guidelines, timelines, and submission requirements stay in one place.
benefits.3d: Share links quickly and close campaigns with transparent feedback.

showcase.title: Creator performance showcase
showcase.earningsDesc: Visual sample by campaign value and complexity.
showcase.contentDesc: From short-form reels to in-store vlogs, optimized for beauty.
showcase.marketsDesc: See where audience response is strongest by region.

discovery.shortformSubtitle: Preview public style references and shape your next content angle faster.
discovery.campaignTitle: Sample campaigns you can apply to
discovery.campaignSubtitle: Filter by market and find opportunities that match your audience.

trust.title: Built for cross-border collaboration
trust.body: One account, transparent application status, and a dedicated space to share your published work with brands.

footer.note: Campaign availability and eligibility may vary by brand and region.
